quality_finding: The homepage preload referenced an older active GeoJSON cache key while the map script requested the current status-filter data key. Aligning both reduces stale-cache risk and avoids duplicate early fetches.
note: No unverified records were added to active data. Candidate import remains separate until source, contractor, schedule, and geometry fields are complete.
